rule: Parse email addresses with Go standard library net/mail ParseAddress before applying policy checks
Reject display names comments and angle-address forms; accept only the bare addr-spec
Do not implicitly trim runtime user input before email parsing
Lowercase the domain before allow-list comparison
If provided require the email domain to equal an allowed domain or end with "." plus an allowed domain
Allow this flag to repeat so admins can authorize multiple domains
If no allowed domains are provided then all syntactically valid domains are allowed
Do not perform MX DNS lookup SMTP validation or other network checks
